mechanism_narrative: Persistent increases in the Consumer Price Index signal rising inflation expectations, compelling investors to demand higher nominal yields on 10-year Treasuries.
failure_condition: The 20-day forward 10-year yield change shows a negative Spearman correlation with CPI changes over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5%, the labor market is tight enough to generate wage inflation that feeds into higher long-term bond yields.
failure_condition: 20-day forward yield does not increase in at least 60% of instances where UNRATE is ≤ 5.0.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is very low and GDP growth is accelerating, markets anticipate a tightening cycle, which pushes 10-year yields higher over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC of the combined signal falls below 0.03 over any 2-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: In a monetary tightening cycle, successive increases in the federal funds rate raise the entire term structure of interest rates, lifting the 10-year yield.
failure_condition: 20-day forward 10-year yield declines in more than 50% of instances when FEDFUNDS increases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts reflect robust residential investment and overall economic demand, which strengthens growth expectations and pushes Treasury yields higher.
failure_condition: The 60-day forward yield change exhibits no positive correlation with HOUST levels over a 3-year rolling period.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production signals a pending recession, driving a flight-to-safety that lowers the 10-year yield.
failure_condition: 20-day forward yield does not decline in at least 50% of instances when INDPRO contracts by more than 1% MoM.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with low unemployment creates labor market tightness that fuels wage inflation, pushing the 10-year yield higher.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 or a hit rate below 55% over any 2-year period.

mechanism_narrative: During economic expansions, strong retail sales growth bolsters consumption expectations, leading to higher real rates and rising 10-year yields over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward yield does not increase in at least 60% of instances when the trigger fires during NBER-dated expansions.
